THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0: So there's a top after all. And you're what holds it up.
I'm surprised you reached me. Few do.
Fascinating. I'd like to grab a sample. Hold still...
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1: Again? You have climbed my Spire twice now.
It didn't quite take the first time. So I came back to be sure.
Nothing here is true. I built every stone of it.
You build from nothing. I work the other way. Break a thing down, learn what's inside. May I?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2: The alchemist returns. You always look so [sine]pleased[/sine] up here.
Wouldn't you be? Everyone else gets one ending. I get to run it again until I understand you.
You never will. That is rather the point of me.
The best sort of question. The kind that keeps you coming back. Once more, from the top.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: Oh! Didn't hear ya come in. Here, take a gem, take two, they're just gatherin' dust in that pile.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Keep the gems. It's that crate of green salt behind you I'm after. The crusted one. What'll you take for it?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: Ha! That ol' thing went rotten years back. Take the whole crate, would ya? It's been stinkin' up my nice pile.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]Rotten.[/sine] To me that's the good part. A thing half-turned into something else, still deciding what.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancien: Back already? Ha! Go on then, what're ya diggin' for this time?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Ingredients. The rare sort. A salt that hums, a resin that won't set. You'd call it spoilage.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancien: Spoilage, that's all that is. ...Ah, take it. One less thing for me to trip over.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.ancie: Ya never take the shiny ones. Always the cracked, the corroded, the spoiled. ...Why's that, eh?
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: The finished ones bore me. Give me the thing still deciding what to be. ...You've kept all of those, haven't you.
DARV.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.ancie: ...Huh. Whole fortune of maybes, and here I've been callin' it a mess.
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: [sine]...up you get, little alchemist...... I have you now...... you fell so far this time......[/sine]
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: ...'This time.' The last thing I remember is climbing. Then nothing. Then your voice. Have we done this before?
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: [sine]...you met him at the summit...... he unmade you...... I set you back at the roots...... now climb......[/sine]
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]Remade, and I can't find the seams. A clean slate. Do you know how rare it is to begin a thing perfectly fresh?[/sine]
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancien: [sine]...down again...... and up again...... you always find your way back to me at the bottom......[/sine]
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: You keep saying 'again.' You remember every attempt I don't, don't you?
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancien: [sine]...I hold every ending you forget...... this was not the first...... it will not be the last......[/sine]
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.char: Most dread starting over. But a result you can repeat is the only kind worth trusting.
NEOW.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.ancie: [sine]...then fall, and I will catch you...... climb, and I will send you...... until the summit holds still......[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.a: Oh, a visitor! And a curious little green one. Here, wear some luck. It suits you far better than all that worry.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.c: Luck. I measure everything I can, out of habit. It's the parts I can't measure that I look forward to.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.a: Hehe! And yet here you are, in my path, unpredicted. Some would call that fortune, little one.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.c: [sine]Or a happy coincidence. I've stopped trying to tell the two apart. Either way, surprise me.[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.a: The dice remember you, little alchemist. They so rarely do. Care to roll again?
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.c: I tried to work out the odds you'd return. I couldn't. It delighted me.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.a: Hehehe! An alchemist who [sine]enjoys[/sine] being wrong!
Every roll so far has fallen your way. But luck is a fickle darling. What happens the day one doesn't?
Then I'll finally have seen it. Honestly? That's the one result I'm still missing. I'd almost welcome it.
Hehehe! You'd thank the dice for ruining you!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.anci: Try this!!! Very good finds!! Look, look!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Black, white, gold, red. Every color at once, worn all together. Extraordinary.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.anci: Pretty colors!! You like?? Take, take!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: I like. Yes. Take, take. And thank you, you wonderful thing.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.anci: Color friend!! You came back!! New shiny for you!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: I keep trying to name your colors and running out of words. That never happens.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.anci: Hehe!! More colors than words!! I win!!
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.anc: You name my colors! Nigredo! Albedo! Funny words!! What they mean??
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.cha: The stages a thing passes through as it becomes itself. You're all of them at once.
OROBAS.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.anc: I am PERFECT?? Hehe!! I knew it!! Take extra shiny!!
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: [thinky_dots]Welcome, friend. Take a piece of me... it will help you...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Everything else in this Spire I've had to take by force. You just offer. It's disarming.
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancien: [thinky_dots]It is freely given... spend it well...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: [sine]Then I'll treat it more carefully than anything I've ever bought.[/sine]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancien: [thinky_dots]You came back... there is always more of me to give...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Doesn't it frighten you? Giving yourself away until there's nothing left?
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancien: [thinky_dots]There is no nothing... only what comes after...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: I keep wondering how you do it. You give freely. I still weigh every cost.
PAEL.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.ancie: [thinky_dots]Then set down the scales... and simply give...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancien: YOU! LITTLE GREEN ONE! GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: I don't carry weapons. Only doses. Make you stronger, make you sicker. Same hand at work either way.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.char: Now [sine]there's[/sine] something worth trying. Together, then?
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancien: YOU RETURN!! LITTLE FROG!! ARE YOU STRONGER YET?!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Stronger and sicker at once. I keep dosing myself just to see what's next.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancien: HAHAHA!! YES!! SHOW THE FROG HIS OWN POISON!!
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: I'd win with patience, not muscle. You'd feel wonderful, right up until you didn't.
TANX.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.ancie: ...HAHAHA!! A SLOW DEATH IS STILL A GLORIOUS DEATH!! TAKE THIS, YOU CREEPY LITTLE FROG!!
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.a: Oh, do come in, dear, out of that draft. Sit by the fire. Now then, what can old Tezcatara do for you?
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.c: They say you take the things folk would rather not carry. Burdens. Regrets. Old flaws. True?
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.a: Every last one, sweetling. Hand them here, and let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] them all clean for you.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-3.c: [sine]Some of them. Not all. I've grown fond of a few.[/sine]
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.a: Back so soon, dearie? Come now, feed the fire, warm those cold little hands.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.c: Truthfully? For the company. My work keeps me cold and careful. You're neither, and I didn't know I missed that.
TEZCATARA.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.a: Then sit, little spark, sit. A fire keeps better company than most folk ever managed.
You alchemists. Always [jitter][b]burning[/b][/jitter], distilling, purifying, same as me. You'd have made a darling apprentice.
You flatter the craft, not me. But I'll take it, and the flame, if you're offering. It's a cold climb from here.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-0.ancie: Look at you, cooking poison in your own veins. Why suffer for scraps? Sign right here and I'll get you some [sine]real[/sine] power.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-1.char: Borrowed power is still a loan. And the hard way is where it gets interesting.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.0-2.ancie: Everyone says that. Right up until the last floor. First taste's [jitter][b]free[/b][/jitter], alchemist. For when you get desperate.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-0.ancie: Back again, and still no signature. Most who resist me stop coming. So what is it you keep sniffing around for?
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-1.char: Your ingredients, mostly. I like to know what a thing's made of before it's offered to me. Even you.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.1-2.ancie: [sine]Made of[/sine]? I am not [sine]made[/sine] of anything, alchemist. I am what the making [jitter][b]costs[/b][/jitter].
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-0r.anci: You poison yourself daily and call [sine]me[/sine] the demon. That's rich.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-1r.char: I know just what mine costs me. Your deals never say. That's the whole difference.
VAKUU.talk.ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST.2-2r.anci: ...Fine print's just a formality. But I'll admit, you'd read it. Pity.
